title: Mecha's XP Storage
description: A mod that adds more XP capabilities, such as craftable experience bottles and long-term storage
body:
# Mecha's XP Storage
A Fabric mod that aims to add more features to enhance the in-game experience system, by adding experience storage and crafting recipes for different kinds of enchantment bottles. This mod is perfect if you want a better way to manage your XP over the course of your playthrough.

## 🌟 Features
- New tiers of powerful experience bottles
- Experience bottle crafting recipes that scale with game progression
- Experience storage block **[UPCOMING]**

## 📷 Demonstration
### New Bottles
![Showing the new experience bottles added by the mod](https://github.com/mechanira/XP-Storage/blob/main/assets/NewBottles.gif?raw=true)
### Crafting Recipes
![Showing the experience bottle crafting recipes](https://github.com/mechanira/XP-Storage/blob/main/assets/CraftingRecipes.gif?raw=true)

## ⚙️ Installation
This mod must be installed on both the **client and server** to work. **Fabric 0.16.9** or newer is required.
